moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The climax of the FIFA World Cup 2026 is set for Sunday, July 19, bringing the global football tournament to a thrilling close.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Three days to go until the biggest game in football. Who are you backing for World Cup glory on Sunday?

angles.name: Team Spirit
angles.copy: The World Cup Final is almost here. What's been your favourite moment from the tournament so far?

moments.title: The Open Championship Live
moments.blurb: Golf's 154th Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale, running from July 16-19, with the world's best golfers competing for the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: On The Green
angles.copy: It's tee-off time at Royal Birkdale! The Open Championship is live this weekend. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golf Glory
angles.copy: The Open is one of the most prestigious tournaments in golf. What's been your favourite moment from day one?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Recap
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 concluded on July 12, after two weeks of thrilling tennis on the grass courts of London.

angles.name: Wimbledon Memories
angles.copy: Wimbledon 2026 may be over, but the memories live on! What was your highlight from this year's tournament?

angles.name: Tennis Talk
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Wimbledon? Who was the standout player for you this year?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland turns 74
moments.blurb: The iconic drummer of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 16.

angles.name: Drum Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland! What's your favourite Police track featuring his unmistakable drumming?

angles.name: Police Power
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to The Police's very own Stewart Copeland, turning 74 today! Still rocking after all these years.

moments.title: Geezer Butler turns 77
moments.blurb: Black Sabbath bassist and lyricist, Geezer Butler, will be celebrating his 77th birthday tomorrow, July 17.

angles.name: Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a true metal pioneer turns 77! Happy early Birthday to Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler.

angles.name: Sabbath Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath fame turns 77 tomorrow. What's your essential Sabbath anthem?

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, will be celebrating his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May, who turns 79 on Sunday! What's your favourite May solo?

angles.name: Queen Royalty
angles.copy: Rock royalty alert! Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday. Let's crank up some Queen!

moments.title: Paul Cook turns 70
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the influential drummer and founding member of punk legends the Sex Pistols, turns 70 on Monday, July 20.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Anarchy in the UK! Happy 70th (early) Birthday to Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook on Monday. What's your favourite punk anthem?

angles.name: Sex Pistols Drummer
angles.copy: Monday marks 70 years for Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols! Still making noise after all these decades.

moments.title: Cat Stevens turns 78
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, will celebrate his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: Peace Train coming! Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78 on Tuesday. What's the song that makes you think of him?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring music of Cat Stevens, who hits 78 on Tuesday. A true songwriting master.

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: She's only 34 on Wednesday! Happy early Birthday to the incredible Selena Gomez. What's your favourite of her hits?

angles.name: Star Power
angles.copy: From Disney to global pop star, Selena Gomez turns 34 this Wednesday! Which era of Selena do you love most?

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist, Slash, will celebrate his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: That top hat and those riffs! Slash turns 61 this Thursday. What's the ultimate Guns N' Roses track for you?

angles.name: GN'R Legend
angles.copy: Happy early 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash, celebrating on Thursday. Still shredding after all these years!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: J-Lo's Day
angles.copy: Jenny from the block turns 57 this Friday! Happy early Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez. What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez hits 57 on Friday. Which of her dancefloor fillers is your absolute favourite?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Sir Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

angles.name: Stones Legend
angles.copy: Jumpin' Jack Flash is 83 on Sunday! Happy early Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Expected
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is typically updated on Fridays, with a new number one and top 40 expected to be announced tomorrow.

angles.name: Chart Race
angles.copy: Who's heading for the top spot? The new Official UK Singles Chart is unveiled tomorrow! Any predictions for Number 1?

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: New music Friday means a new UK Singles Chart is on its way! What songs are you hoping to see climb the ranks?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is currently airing, keeping viewers hooked with new drama and relationships from the villa.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Is anyone else completely addicted to Love Island UK right now? What's the latest twist you can't get enough of?

angles.name: Summer TV
angles.copy: It's peak Love Island season! Who's your favourite couple in the villa and who do you think will make it to the final?
